text.title: Solo Incident Triage Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Solo Incident Triage Checklist end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: assess
step.action: Confirm impact: who, how many, what's broken. Time-box to 5 min.
step.decision-gate: If unclear after 5 min, assume worst-case and proceed to CONTAIN.

step.name: contain
step.action: Pick: rollback OR feature-flag off. Forward-fix only if containment impossible.

step.name: communicate
step.action: Post status page update OR customer email within 15 min of detection.
step.decision-gate: If comms not sent by 15-min mark, escalate to 'send minimal acknowledgement now'.

step.name: fix
step.action: Test fix in staging or local clone; deploy with normal deploy-checklist.

step.name: learn
step.action: Write blameless postmortem within 72h: root cause + ≥1 corrective action.
